pros: Native Korean STT/TTS of high quality
Integrated with KT Cloud for local hosting
cons: Smaller model vs global frontier LLMs
review.verdict: The pragmatic Korean stack if data residency with KT matters more than frontier model quality.
review.best_for: Korean enterprises needing on-shore speech and LLM with KT Cloud
review.not_for: Global products or teams needing frontier-level LLM reasoning
